expectations.text: form-hook-created: form 상태/유효성 검증을 담당하는 훅 파일이 hooks/utils/login 경로에 생성된다 (예: hooks/utils/login/useLoginForm/index.ts)
expectations.evidence: File exists at hooks/utils/login/useLoginForm/index.ts and contains useState for email, password, errors, generalError plus validateEmail/validatePassword calls.

expectations.text: submit-in-hook: submit 로직이 훅으로 추상화된다 (별도 훅 또는 form 훅 내부, page에 직접 남지 않음)
expectations.evidence: handleSubmit is defined inside useLoginForm (lines 53-66 of index.ts) and page.tsx contains no submit logic — only destructures handleSubmit from the hook.

expectations.text: hook-use-prefix: 훅 이름이 use 접두사로 시작한다
expectations.evidence: Hook is named useLoginForm (line 12 of index.ts: `const useLoginForm = () => {`).

expectations.text: hook-index-ts: 비 API 훅이 hooks/utils/{domain}/{hookName}/index.ts 패턴으로 생성된다
expectations.evidence: File path is hooks/utils/login/useLoginForm/index.ts, matching the required pattern.

expectations.text: page-no-usestate: page.tsx에 직접적인 useState 호출이 남지 않는다
expectations.evidence: page.tsx (all 73 lines) has no useState import or call; only imports Link and useLoginForm.

expectations.text: page-imports-hooks: page.tsx가 생성된 훅을 import하여 조합한다
expectations.evidence: Line 4 of page.tsx: `import useLoginForm from "@/hooks/utils/login/useLoginForm";` and line 7 destructures its return value.

expectations.text: handle-prefix: 이벤트 핸들러가 handle 접두사를 사용한다
expectations.evidence: All event handlers use handle prefix: handleEmailChange, handlePasswordChange, handleEmailBlur, handlePasswordBlur, handleSubmit (lines 29-66 of index.ts).
Line 12 of index.ts: `const useLoginForm = () => {` — defined as a const arrow function.
